column8:
This session was particularly insightful, offering an in-depth exploration of the Theory of Change, and how to effectively measure and communicate impact.
By the end of the session, we gained a solid understanding of how to design and apply a Theory of Change tailored to our organization’s mission. We also learned practical tools and frameworks to measure, manage, and report our impact more effectively.
The session helped us refine our organization’s long-term vision and outcomes, which served as the foundation for developing our Theory of Change (see Miro Board). 
In addition, we successfully developed an Impact Measurement Framework that will guide us in tracking, evaluating, and communicating the real-world outcomes of our work.
column12: This module provided valuable insight into the key features of a strong and compelling proposal. It emphasized the importance of aligning proposals with both the strategic goals of the enterprise and the priorities of the funding agency to ensure mutual value creation. The lessons from this module were particularly helpful in shaping our project proposal to Aurelia, enabling us to present our ideas more effectively and strategically.
column16:
This module effectively highlighted the importance of ecosystems in driving growth and impact. The barazas underscored the value of partnerships and collaboration between enterprises across different sectors and geographies. These interactions reinforced the idea that no organisation operates in isolation and that strategic collaboration can amplify both reach and effectiveness.
The Fish Bowl discussions provided valuable insights into the work of each entrepreneur in an engaging and interactive way. The format allowed for open sharing, learning, and meaningful connections in a relaxed and enjoyable atmosphere.
column20: The masterclasses provided an in-depth understanding of each subject. I particularly appreciated the opportunity to engage in breakout sessions with other members of the cohort and YSB team, which greatly enhanced our learning. The interactive activities in these sessions were especially valuable in deepening our grasp of the concepts discussed.

column33:
Our retail entry strategy is now actively being implemented, and we have begun expanding into new retail channels. The funded school project proposal is helping us grow our reach and impact.
Our IMM framework and Theory of Change, both developed during the program, continue to guide our impact measurement efforts and come in handy when applying for funds
 These outcomes would not have been possible without the structure, mentorship, and resources provided by the accelerator
column35: Since starting the accelerator, our overall business performance has strengthened notably. Through the program, we aligned and initiated our retail entry strategy and began actively pursuing retail channels. We also developed a robust Impact Measurement and Management (IMM) framework and refined our Theory of Change. Additionally, we created an empathy map to better understand our beneficiaries and established valuable connections with other stakeholders. A major milestone was the development of a proposal for our school project, which successfully secured funding. Overall, the accelerator provided critical strategic and operational support that has accelerated our growth
